screen.note: A screen PASS is a promotion-PROBE candidate only; production G10 (DSR>=0.95, PBO) and cross-engine reproduction remain mandatory before HG-3.
screen.rule: best>0 AND beats_buy_hold AND all_three_thirds_positive AND neighbourhood_positive_fraction>=0.6 AND trades>=10

strategies.source: EMA 12/26 crossover, MACD trend proxy (Appel, public)
